content:
# Recommendations — next plan iter (post iter-316)

## HIGH — FBC: the affine brick is done, but the leaves need a Spec-model bridge FIRST
`cech_degree_affine_baseChange` is sorry-free, but it CANNOT be wired into the two leaves
(`cech_pushforward_baseChange_natIso` L377, `twisted_cech_nerve_iso` L423). The leaf `app n`
obligation is the ABSTRACT `pushPullObj F Yₙ` (= `p_* p^* F` over the fibre power), not `tilde M`
over `Spec`; the brick only speaks the affine model. **Do NOT re-assign a prover to "wire the brick
into the leaves" — it will hit the same wall.** Instead:
1. **blueprint-writer** on `Cohomology_CechHigherDirectImage.tex`: add a new `lem:pushPullObj_iso_tilde`
   Spec-model bridge block (`pushPullObj F Yₙ ≅ tilde M` on the affine model of a fibre power; state
   what affineness/separatedness hypothesis it needs and where it comes from in the Čech setup), and
   expand both leaf proof sketches to insert that identification before invoking the brick. (lvb-fbc316
   major adequacy gap; `% NOTE:` placed at chapter ~§12836.)
2. Consider **effort-breaker** on `lem:cech_pushforward_baseChange_natIso` if the bridge itself needs
   affineness machinery not yet present — it may be a multi-step sub-chain.
3. Only after the bridge block exists + blueprint HARD-GATE clears: send a prover to close one leaf.

## MEDIUM — DUAL: close `sliceDualTransportInv.naturality` (L584), then `dual_restrict_iso` (L1210)
Forward `sliceDualTransport.toFun.naturality` is CLOSED axiom-clean (3→2). The reverse leaf is ADVANCED
to a clean carrier-level residual. Continue (CONVERGING, not churning):
- Close L584 with the **mirror** of the forward recipe; the reverse-specific extra step (lvb-dual316):
  the parallel thin-poset `M.val.map` legs are only `Subsingleton.elim`-equal (no pushforward to absorb
  the collapse) — insert an explicit alignment before `ψ.naturality` fires.
- Keep the standalone-first discipline: if the reverse close is heartbeat-heavy, extract
  `sliceDualTransportInv_naturality` as its OWN top-level lemma, confirm green via full `lake env lean`
  (LSP times out on DualInverse) BEFORE wiring. This discipline worked this iter.
- `dual_restrict_iso` Step-4 (L1210) is gated behind L584 — assign only after L584 lands.

## MEDIUM — stale `.lean` comments (review cannot edit .lean; need a prover/refactor touch)
From aud316. Have the owning prover fix the comment when next editing these files (low effort, prevents
wasted prover cycles):
- `CechHigherDirectImageUnconditional.lean` L450-457: `cechComplex_baseChange_iso` docstring says "STUB"
  but body is sorry-free (stale pre-iter-315). USER comment L458-463 asks to "assemble the per-degree
  isos into a chain" — already done.
- `DualInverse.lean` L1205-1208: comment claims the blocker is `sliceDualTransport`'s `.hom` (closed
  iter-316); the real blocker is `sliceDualTransportInv.naturality` (L584).

## LOW — 1-to-1 coverage debt (planner to blueprint)
- `sliceDualTransport_toFun_naturality` (`DualInverse.lean` L628, sorry-free) — new unmatched `lean_aux`,
  no blueprint block. Its content (leg-A∘leg-B ε-paste) is described inside `lem:slice_dual_transport`
  prose; add a thin `\lean{}`-pinned helper block (or fold explicitly) to restore correspondence.
- Pre-existing unmatched count = 381 (mostly GenericFreeness/GradedModule held lanes) — unchanged, off
  the active front.

## LOW — blueprint-doctor broken crefs (off active front)
- `Picard_GlueDescent.tex`: 2 broken `\cref`/`\uses` (`lem:gr_glueChartComponent_leg_compat`,
  `lem:gr_glueChartFamily_pullback_map_pi`).
- `Picard_QuotScheme.tex`: ~12 broken `\cref` (def:over_restrict_equiv, lem:annihilator_localization_eq_map,
  …). No `\uses`-damage on active chapters; repoint/mark-private when the held Quot/Glue lanes reopen.

## Reusable proof patterns discovered this iter
- **DUAL forward naturality recipe** (banked in PROJECT_STATUS KB iter-316): leg-A `PresheafOfModules.naturality_apply`
  (bind as `have hnat := ...; erw [hnat]`, NOT direct `erw [naturality_apply]` which leaves a stuck-`Ring`
  metavariable) ∘ leg-B `appIso_hom_naturality_apply f i _`; inv-ε collapse via `εInv_apply` +
  `ofBijective_appIso_inv_symm`.
- **Standalone-first discipline works** — write the heartbeat-heavy lemma top-level with its own budget,
  confirm green via full `lake env lean` in isolation, THEN `exact` it. No DUAL regression this iter.
